disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Perioral and peripheral (fingers) numbness and tingling evolving over 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Where do you feel the numbness or tingling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started around my mouth and in my fingers about two days ago — a numb, tingly feeling that has got worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful carpal spasm — hands drawing up into a claw posture, in episodic waves
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your hands are doing?
Are the cramps constant or do they come in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands keep seizing up and locking into claw shapes — it's painful and comes in waves.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue, generalised weakness and postural lightheadedness
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got no energy at all, I feel weak, and I go lightheaded when I stand up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of recurrent oral candidiasis since childhood, plus depigmented skin patches and patchy scalp hair loss
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any long-standing health conditions?
Any recurring infections, skin or hair changes over the years?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had thrush in my mouth on and off since I was a child, I've got white patches on my skin where I've lost colour, and some bald patches on my scalp.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent unintentional weight loss and new cold intolerance
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any weight change?
Have you been feeling the cold more than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost some weight without trying, and I've been feeling the cold a lot more lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Erratic adherence to over-the-counter calcium supplementation
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any supplements or medicines?
How regularly do you take them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take over-the-counter calcium tablets but honestly I'm pretty hit and miss with them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no on-site support during an escalating neuromuscular crisis
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
Do you have support at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own — there's nobody here with me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No rapid breathing, no breathlessness, oxygenation subjectively normal (pertinent negative against hyperventilation as sole cause)
trigger_question_examples: Are you breathing fast or feeling short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing feels normal — I'm not puffing or short of breath, it's the cramps and numbness that are the problem.
